description: Typography glossary data grouped by scoped category. Term records live in the referenced category files.

categories.label: Glyph anatomy
categories.description: Named parts of glyph construction and visible letterform structure.

categories.label: Spacing and metrics
categories.description: Measurements, guides, spacing behavior, and layout metrics used to position type.

categories.label: OpenType features
categories.description: Registered OpenType layout features and feature-driven glyph substitutions or positioning.

categories.label: Type styles and classification
categories.description: Typeface styles, classifications, families, and market or production groupings.

categories.label: Font technology
categories.description: Rendering, encoding, packaging, and implementation concepts around digital fonts.

categories.label: File formats and standards
categories.description: Font file formats, wrappers, and character encoding standards.
